LAW AND MOTION, DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL MATTERS INVOLVING REAL PROPERTY AND RELATED LOANS. THE DEMURRER IS CONTINUED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON DECEMBER 21, 2018 AT 9:30 A.M. JP MORGAN SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE COMPLAINT PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2019 Off Calendar

Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Duncan McGee Nefcy (415-315-1653) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Dafne Engstrom.
Jake Freed (415-276-6532) for Defendant/Moving party JP Morgan Chase Bank.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff indicates the matter will be dismissed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Jpmorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint is off calendar. Plaintiff to file a dismissal. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is TRANSFERRED to department 501 per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. That department handles all matters involving real property and related loans. The demurrer is CONTINUED to be heard in department 501 on December 21, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. JP Morgan shall provide a courtesy copy of the complaint per SF Local Rule 2.7B with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
